creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
Im take latest version from linux and make diff with latest webcamd from ports.
I need { USB_DEVICE_WACOM(0x33C) } support.

Also create patch to input-wacom and xorg-server to support hot plug and unplug.
I will take some code from https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=196678 and create new PR later.
